name: api-data-research
summary: Research and compare official and third-party API data access, verify exact fields from docs, and produce capability matrices.

name: miniapp-figma-alignment
summary: Align mini-program, uni-app, Taro, and other mini-app pages to Figma designs using correct frame-width scaling, rpx conversion, platform chrome handling, and visual QA.

name: markdown-platform-pack
summary: Convert Markdown articles into platform-ready Word packages by rasterizing tables and fenced code blocks, rewriting a temporary Markdown file, and exporting a local docx file for Xiaohongshu or WeChat import flows.

name: agent-pipeline-orchestration
summary: Manage coding or research work as a non-blocking multi-agent pipeline with bounded lanes for implementation, review, QA, and next-phase mapping.

name: social-content-parser
summary: Auto-detect and parse public Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and Bilibili share links through BugPk public APIs, clean noisy share parameters, route Douyin profile and work links separately, and fall back to a general short-video parser when needed.

name: ai-news-digest
summary: Fetch current AI news from RSS/Atom feeds, optional X and non-RSS sources, and GitHub AI trending, then produce a dated digest with links and trend notes.
